properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: The field where the jwt token secret will be placed.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: The field which defines the jwt expiration in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.cookie-name
properties.description: The field which defines the jwt token's cookie name.

properties.name: cloudflare.r2.region
properties.description: Region — use 'auto' for prod R2, 'us-east-1' for LocalStack.
